name: Query Flow Agent
description: An agent that helps with query flow operations and data analysis.

name: Data Quality Agent
description: An agent specialized in data quality checks and validation.

name: Catalog Search Agent
description: An agent that helps search and navigate the data catalog.

name: SQL Analysis Agent
description: An agent that analyzes SQL queries and provides insights.

name: Metadata Agent
description: An agent that manages and enriches metadata across the catalog.

name: Data Lineage Agent
description: An agent that tracks and visualizes data lineage across systems.

name: Schema Discovery Agent
description: An agent that automatically discovers and documents database schemas.

name: Compliance Agent
description: An agent that ensures data compliance with regulations and policies.

name: Performance Monitor Agent
description: An agent that monitors query performance and suggests optimizations.

name: Data Profiling Agent
description: An agent that profiles data to understand patterns and distributions.

name: Access Control Agent
description: An agent that manages data access permissions and security.

name: Documentation Agent
description: An agent that automatically generates and maintains data documentation.

name: Anomaly Detection Agent
description: An agent that detects anomalies and outliers in data patterns.

name: ETL Orchestration Agent
description: An agent that orchestrates ETL processes and data pipelines.

name: Data Validation Agent
description: An agent that validates data integrity and business rules.

name: Report Generation Agent
description: An agent that generates automated reports and dashboards.

name: Data Classification Agent
description: An agent that classifies and tags data based on content and context.

name: Backup Management Agent
description: An agent that manages data backups and recovery procedures.

name: Cost Optimization Agent
description: An agent that optimizes data storage and compute costs.

name: Integration Agent
description: An agent that facilitates data integration between different systems.
